calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-24-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance by Respondent/Plaintiff Yun Hu (Case called at 10:16 a.m.).
Appellant/Defendant Anne Victoria Lee in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo this day.
Appellant is placed under oath.
Appellant testifies on her own behalf, and responds to the questions from the Court.
Documentary evidence is introduced, and returned to the Appellant in open court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission.

Dept. 525. Judge Pro Tem Robert (Bob) Aune; Clerk S. Ravinantapricha; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-20-2018 Judgment Entered
